headline: AI Video Generation: Sora, Veo, and the Future of Synthetic Media
description: AI video generation exploded in 2024-2025 from research demos to commercial tools. Sora, Veo, and Runway now generate minutes of coherent video from text prompts, with professional filmmaking applications emerging.

citation.name: Video generation models as world simulators (Sora)
Veo: Google's Most Capable Video Generation Model
